visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged Asian man with glasses, a plaid cap, and a black t-shirt featuring a green logo is talking to the camera. He is in an indoor studio with a neutral grey background. Yellow variety text appears at the bottom. (2) A graphic of a vintage Nokia 3310 mobile phone appears to the right of the man's head while he continues to speak and gesture with his hands. (3) The Nokia graphic disappears, and the man explains a story with enthusiastic facial expressions and hand movements. (4) A graphic of a white iPhone 13 Pro appears on the left side of the frame. (5) The iPhone graphic moves downwards vertically with a motion blur effect as if it is falling. (6) A red location pin icon appears on the right side of the screen. (7) The iPhone graphic reappears in the center-left, surrounded by white four-pointed star sparkles to signify it is undamaged. (8) Numerical text overlays appear on the screen regarding currency conversion. (9) A small cartoon graphic of a skydiver with a red parachute and a yellow speech bubble appears in the lower-middle part of the frame. (10) Three red question mark graphics appear around the man's head as he poses a question to the audience, finally pointing his index finger towards the camera lens.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @ 3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 最堅固手機. (2) [Slogan]: Nokia 3310. (3) [Subtitle]: 英國有一名跳傘員 從萬呎高空跳傘時. (4) [Subtitle]: iPhone意外從口袋滑落 直接墜地. (5) [Subtitle]: 他用尋找我的iPhone定位 找到手機後. (6) [Subtitle]: 螢幕沒有壞 整個機身呢毫無損傷. (7) [Subtitle]: 更扯的是 手機當時只裝了 價值10英鎊. (8) [Slogan]: 大概台幣390元. [Variety]: 價值10英鎊. (9) [Variety]: 這比Nokia還神!. (10) [Subtitle]: 究竟是iPhone耐摔 還是這個 新台幣390元 手機殼的保護力 實在太強 你們覺得呢.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing a grey and black plaid ivy cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a black crew-neck t-shirt with a green graphic. He wears a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple, out-of-focus indoor studio background with neutral grey walls and subtle vertical shadows.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic male voice begins speaking in Mandarin with a clear, resonant tone. Background music (BGM) is a bright, high-tempo electronic track with a steady 4/4 beat. (2) A synthesized 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as a graphic appears. (3) Continuous fast-paced narration with high vocal arousal. (4) A second 'whoosh' sound effect as the iPhone graphic enters the mix. (5) A cartoon-style descending whistle sound effect mimics the falling phone, ending in a light 'pop'. (6) Narration continues with emphasized pitch on key words like '螢幕' and '機身'. (7) A magical 'sparkle' chime or ding sound effect plays. (8) A series of soft bubble 'pops' play in rapid succession as price text appears. (9) A high-pitched comic 'ding' sound effect sounds. (10) The speaker's voice rises in a questioning intonation at the end. BGM maintains a consistent volume until a sharp cut-off at the video's end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Story Exposition -> Climax/Surprise -> Question to Audience
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share an interesting piece of tech news regarding the durability of an iPhone and its affordable protective case, using the legendary toughness of the Nokia 3310 as a comparison point to generate engagement and discussion.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presence of the 'miko' logo throughout the video suggest a sponsorship or endorsement from a mobile retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly polished, social-media-native vertical video with excellent audio-visual synchronization and effective use of graphics to tell a concise story.
